narrative:
Dublin Township (precinct in Mercer County) has 721 registered voters, with 58.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.9 percentage points.
